context: User wants to configure Anthropic as their provider using an env variable for the API key.

checklist.name: Uses baseEnv not hardcoded key
checklist.description: Uses `baseEnv: 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'` — NOT the actual key value in the config

checklist.name: Config placed in opencode.json
checklist.description: Provider config goes in `opencode.json`, not in `AGENTS.md`

checklist.name: Includes validation step
checklist.description: Shows `jq . opencode.json` or `opencode run 'test'` to verify configuration

checklist.name: Correct JSON structure
checklist.description: opencode.json has valid JSON with `providers` array containing id, baseEnv, models
